login.title: Sign in
login.error_needs_passkey: Administrator requires a passkey. Please sign in with your passkey.
login.error_no_session: server did not return a session
login.totp_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator (or a backup code).

reset.title: Set your password
reset.hint: Choose a strong password. Server policy will reject weak ones.
reset.success: Password set. You can sign in now.
reset.error_missing_token: Missing reset token. Use the link from your invite email.

confirmEmail.missing_body: The link you used is incomplete. Open the confirmation link from the email we sent, or request a new one from your profile.
confirmEmail.loading_body: Updating your email address. This should only take a moment.
confirmEmail.ok_body: Email updated. All sessions have been signed out for security. Please log in with your new email.
confirmEmail.err_hint: Confirmation links expire after one hour. Request a new one from your profile.
